outcome_definition: full_time = (uhrswork >= 35) for records with valid usual hours
sample_selection: citizen in {3, 4, 5} (non-citizen statuses that reported legal documentation)
treatment_definition: treatment = 1 when birthyr between 1982 and 1996 AND yrimmig is non-missing & <= 2007 AND arrival age (yrimmig - birthyr) is between 0 and 15
